title: Feed poller dedup breaks on non-chronological feeds
description: feed.rs processes entries in reverse order and breaks when it hits last_seen_id. This assumes entries are in chronological order, which RSS/Atom specs don't guarantee. Should instead skip any entry whose id matches a previously-seen source_ref in the posts table, not break on first match.
close_reason: All quick fixes applied: markdown rendering, feed dedup, rate limiter wired in, error logging, shared HTTP client, clippy+rustfmt clean
